body: DONE — scripts/e2e-sse-streaming.sh (UC-20). Probes SSE endpoint availability, opens background curl -N connection with SSE_TIMEOUT=12s, creates session+run, appends run_state_changed+tool_invocation_started events, waits 3s for propagation, kills SSE client, parses SSE log for data: frames and event types, verifies via /v1/events/recent, cleans up process. Accepts 000/404/501 as SKIP. Bash syntax OK.
